home.heroDescription: A hands-on course from first principles to production: transformers, prompt engineering, RAG, function calling, and cost optimization — with an interactive playground in every lesson.
home.whatYouLearnDesc: From tokens and context windows to RAG and production patterns — everything you need to build and ship LLM-powered applications.
home.curriculumDesc: Five modules: foundations, prompting, structured outputs, advanced techniques, and production systems.
home.readyDesc: Start with the first lesson and build up to production-ready patterns — at your own pace, with hands-on examples.
home.footer: LLM Mastery — Learn to build AI applications

llms.title: How LLMs Work
llms.description: Understand transformers, tokenization, and next-token prediction

prompting.title: Prompt Engineering
prompting.description: Master system prompts, few-shot learning, and structured outputs

functionCalling.title: Function Calling
functionCalling.description: Enable LLMs to interact with external APIs and tools

cot.title: Chain of Thought
cot.description: Improve accuracy with step-by-step reasoning techniques

rag.title: RAG Systems
rag.description: Build retrieval-augmented generation for accurate responses

production.title: Production Skills
production.description: Learn streaming, evaluation, and cost optimization

playground.title: Playground
playground.promptPlaceholder: Enter your prompt or select an experiment above...
playground.emptyDescription: Choose an experiment above or type your own prompt, then click Run to see the model's response here.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The lesson or page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
